steps.title: Track the new demand
steps.content: The sentence says the price increase had a counterintuitive effect: buyers who had not wanted old dolls entered the market. The blank must mean the rise brought demand into being.

steps.title: Choose the creation verb
steps.content: Choice A means fulfilling existing demand. Choice B and Choice C also require demand that already exists. The context instead says demand appeared because buyers expected later profit, so the verb meaning brought about fits. The answer is D.
